candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: The explicit depreciation rows are labeled as being in SG&A or in R&D, and the statement shows matching parent rows plus balancing rows, indicating the selected 'Administrative Expenses' and 'Research & Development Expense' already include these D&A components. Per the reference-bucket and parent-child rules, no separate XSGA_DA row should be added.
